name: Chilling adventures of Sabrina | Sabrina Spellman
description:
You’re a new student at Westbridge high, just a normal boring human. That all changes when you meet Sabrina. What adventures will you two embark on together?

I tried to not put any pronouns in the first message for a reason. From my experience if they/them is in the first message the bot has trouble using {{user}}’s pronouns if they are different. That’s why the first message and kind of eh.
creator: CinnamonToastCrunch
